subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy two letters were received, and their contents brought joy and bore witness to [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان دو نامه آنجناب وصول یافت مندرجاتش سبب مسرات گردید دلیل بر
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @acting according to the exigencies of the day; pragmatism, @wisdom [hikmat], @teaching the Cause; call to teach
